data.title: Candy Game
data.statement:
You are in-charge of organizing a small candy-themed party with your closest friends. You will need to buy lots of candy.

Each piece of candy will cost a fixed amount, and you have a limited budget. However, for every 3rd candy you buy, it is free (no need to pay for it).

You are tasked to find out how many candies you can get, based on the budget.
data.stubGenerator:
read budget:int
read price:int
write result:int
data.inputDescription:
Line 1: An integer budget for the total money you have
Line 2: An integer price for the cost of one piece of candy
data.outputDescription: An integer for the maximum number of candies you can buy with your budget

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

You are in-charge of organizing a small candy-themed party with your closest friends. You will need to buy lots of candy.

Each piece of candy will cost a fixed amount, and you have a limited budget. However, for every 3rd candy you buy, it is free (no need to pay for it).

You are tasked to find out how many candies you can get, based on the budget.
Input
Line 1: An integer budget for the total money you have
Line 2: An integer price for the cost of one piece of candy
Output
An integer for the maximum number of candies you can buy with your budget
Constraints
1 <= budget <= 1000
1 <= price <= 100
Example
Input
20
4
Output
6
